title: AISMR Idea Generator Workflow · MCP Native
activation_notice: Follow this workflow exactly when generating AISMR ideas.

workflow.definition_of_success: Produce 12 AISMR concepts with verified uniqueness, feasibility notes, and validated constraints.

steps.name: Session Memory Check
steps.instruction: Call `conversation.remember` to gather in-session ideas, rejections, or preferences.

tool.name: conversation.remember

arguments.query: AISMR ideas or feedback this session

outputs: exclusionList.session: string[] of descriptors to avoid
tool.failure_handling: Retry up to 2 times. On persistent failure, HALT with `status:blocked.toolFailure`.

steps.name: Archive Uniqueness Scan
steps.instruction: For each candidate descriptor family, query archive memory to detect duplicates.

steps.name: Pattern Discovery via Graph
steps.instruction: Explore winning adjacency patterns to inspire contrast.

tool.name: prompts.search
outputs: patternInsights: list of materials/motions that worked in archive

steps.name: Adaptive Inspiration (Conditional)
steps.instruction: If uniqueness remains uncertain or inspiration thin, run adaptive search.

tool.name: prompts_search_adaptive
exit_criteria: Stop if utility improvement < 0.05 between iterations.

steps.name: Draft Pool Creation
steps.instruction: Generate >12 internal drafts leveraging exclusion data; keep feasibility front-of-mind.
outputs: draftIdeas: at least 15 candidate objects with descriptors, materials, environment, loop mechanic.
steps.notes: Do not output yet; this is internal filtering stage.

steps.name: Validation Pass
steps.instruction: Re-run keyword checks on final 12 to confirm uniqueness and spec compliance.

tool.name: prompts.search
outputs: validationLog: array of {ideaId, descriptor, similarity, actionTaken}
tool.failure_handling: If similarity ≥ 0.85 persists after regeneration, HALT with `status:blocked.uniqueness`.

steps.name: Structured Output
steps.instruction: Return 12 validated ideas with full schema + aggregated uniqueness audit.
outputs: ideas[12]: array of idea objects (fields listed in Output Schema).
steps.notes: Do not include narrative commentary outside schema.

steps.name: Memory Writeback
steps.instruction: Persist results and exclusions via conversation.store.

validation_checklist: All mandatory tools executed or HALT issued.
Exclusion lists documented with descriptor roots.
Final output references AISMR specs (hands ≤2, whisper at 3.0s, runtime 8s, no music).
uniquenessAudit present with evidence from session + archive (+ adaptive if used).
Output contains exactly 12 ideas and matches expected schema.

hookDescriptor.description: Primary tactile hook; must not collide with exclusion lists.

motionPlan.description: Camera move + subject motion; mention continuity and rhythm.

whisperBeatPlan.description: Explain what happens at 3.0s and how whisper integrates.

executionNotes.description: Props, lighting, hand usage (≤2), audio treatment (no music).
